reviews.review_description:
Major creepy at 1 point in this 5 minute demo? At least I think it was else I was doing something wrong. 
Potential

Frighting and dangers live in the shadows. Really enjoy this mystery. One problem I had and not sure if it was due to the way I was playing but I dropped the lighter and could not find a way to recover it. I was just stuck in the game with no solution as what to do next. Other than that, I enjoyed it.

reviews.review_title: Too scared to provide a decent review
reviews.review_description:
Ok so I'm not good with scary games and I only lasted about 5 mins before I got freaked out! From what I saw, the graphics were good and the sound/atmosphere was really creepy. The idea is to stay in the light or rather not focus on the darkness... not sure what happens but it felt like there was a malevolent presence just waiting to jumpscare me- NOPE! 
I'll update if I get any further. 
If you like scary games/experiences you may as well give this a go, it's free after all!
